sentiment: Every mark we make carries a ghost of intention, dissolving into motion before it can be read.

stories.title: Fable turned reMarkable into Tom Riddle's diary from Harry Potter
stories.summary: A project that transforms the reMarkable tablet into a living diary — write on its surface and it writes back, echoing the enchanted journal from Harry Potter. The boundary between tool and companion blurs when the page starts talking.

stories.title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
stories.summary: An open-source hardware router built for people who want to own their network stack completely. A reminder that the infrastructure beneath our daily connections can be transparent, repairable, and truly ours.

stories.title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
stories.summary: A community-driven fork of Organic Maps offering fully offline, privacy-respecting navigation. Finding your way without being tracked — the oldest form of orientation, made modern.
